text.title: Product Launch Examples
text.summary: Two launch examples — a Product Hunt launch targeting top product of the day, and a beta launch targeting 100 qualified users — with timelines and outcomes.

example.note: AI writing tool. Goal: top-5 Product of the Day. 4-week pre-launch preparation. Outcome: #3 PD, 1,200 signups.
example.code:
Product: AI Writing Tool Goal: #1 Product of the Day (stretch) / Top 5 (target)
T-4 weeks: Build relationships with top hunters; identify 3 candidates T-2 weeks: Assets complete (listing copy, gallery, first comment draft) Gather 5 customer testimonials T-1 week: Brief 200+ supporters; schedule all announcement posts T-Day: 12:01 AM PT — listing live 9 AM: Email announcement to list (2,400 subscribers) 10 AM: Twitter/LinkedIn thread All day: Respond to every Product Hunt comment within 30 min
Result: #3 Product of the Day, 1,200 signups day 1, 340 active at day 7

example.note: Analytics dashboard. Goal: 100 qualified beta users. Staged rollout from existing customers to waitlist.
example.code:
Product: Analytics Dashboard Goal: 100 beta users with 40%+ week-1 active rate
Stage 1: Soft launch to 50 existing power customers (week 1-2) Gather structured feedback; fix critical UX issues Stage 2: Open to waitlist (500 people) — accept first 100 who complete onboarding Send personal invite emails (not mass blast) Stage 3: Waitlist users who are declined go to "notify me for GA" list
Result: 100 beta users, 42% active in week 1, 12 critical bugs found and fixed before GA, waitlist-to-GA conversion: 68%
